...Dress Fabrics: We have back in stock ex-designer fabrics from Raymond Storry!
Tash Hutchins is back showing us how to create the Tessuti Lily Linen Dress which is brand new to Sewing Street.
Featuring beautifully crafted essentials inspired by iconic patterns, these tools combine practicality with classic style for makers who appreciate detail.
...Flaneur Pants: Tash Hutchins is going to be showing how to create Friday Pattern Company The Flaneur Pants which is brand new to Sewing Street.
Elna Embroidery Machines - personalise every project with beautiful stitched designs, monograms, and professional embroidery at the touch of a button.
Founded in the Netherlands, Studio Light has been a beloved name in the craft industry for over 40 years, inspiring creativity and innovation among crafters worldwide.
Join Helen for must-have papercraft items, designed to spark your imagination and transform your projects. Who doesn't love a craft steal? At these prices you're in for a treat!
One of the most exciting brands in UK craft today, Jamie Rodgers Crafts aim is to inspire with his products, ideas and techniques! Always good value and quality.

Hahnemühle, around since 1584, makes premium art and photo papers loved for their texture, durability, and ability to keep colours vibrant for years.

Get back to basics with paper and embellishments! Tune in for incredible deals on crafting supplies that are affordable, colorful and fun.

Celebrate the iconic prints, rich history, and endless inspiration of Liberty fabrics - the perfect dose of creativity and colour!
Kathryn Ross is back on Sewing Street with some gorgeous Cotton Fairy kits & patterns.
Discover the essential tools every maker needs!
Join Kathryn Ross for a second hour with some more gorgeous Cotton Fairy kits & patterns.
Discover the versatility of overlockers and simple stitching techniques in this inspiring hour on Sewing Street.
One of the most exciting brands in UK craft today, Jamie Rodgers Crafts aim is to inspire with his products, ideas and techniques!
Specialising in innovative products, Katy Sue Designs and manufactures award-winning silicone moulds and paper craft products for creative people worldwide.
Emlems Silicone Moulds is a family run UK business who create beautiful, high quality, sturdy handmade moulds right here in the UK.
Samantha K Crafts are here for some mixed media fun, MDF, Chipboard, Ricepapers and more.
